briefdescription.para: prevent circular inclusions by using protection macros

memberdef.name: VRR_MODE
memberdef.initializer: 1 /** 0 - NO VRR , 1 - MANUAL STRETCH , 2 - AUTO STRETCH */

briefdescription.para: Note : In Auto Stretch Mode, Enable/Disable VRR is not supported.

detaileddescription.para: VRR/FSYNC is always on in VTEM/AMD VSIF Packet

briefdescription.para: This enumeration defines the 'type' of sources that can provide a video stream for the transmitter to output in the example design.
This enmueration defines the Dynamic HDR TYPE.
Define a function pointer for user enabled printing.

memberdef.name: Dynamic_hdr_type
memberdef.initializer: ={ {"No Dynamic HDR"}, {"ST 2094-10"}, {"ETSI TS 103-433-1"}, {"ITU-T H.265 CRI"}, {"ST 2094-40"}, {"HDR10+ VSIF"}, {"HDR VIVID VS-EMDS"}, }

briefdescription.para: This file contains set of definition for the main application.

para.preformatted:
Ver Who Date Changes dd/mm/yy
1.00 YB 11/05/19 Initial release.
